title: Business-driven methodology journey (BIZ-0001 / WF-0036-0038 / OP-0005)
description: Canonical, checkpointed map the verifier walks to tell the agent the EXACT next step. One journey with branches by work nature + execution ceremony. Stages are ordered; `requires` are machine-checkable preconditions; `command` is host-resolved by the surfacing layer. ADR-0127.

stages.title: Classify the request (intake)
stages.guidance: Run the intake classifier to resolve Work Nature (business|operation), Tier, and Execution Ceremony before any substantive work.

stages.title: Create the Operation work context
stages.guidance: Materialize the OP-#### context (operation.json + reason.md + tasks.md). Dry-run first, then --apply.

stages.title: Create / open the Business work context
stages.guidance: A business change runs under a Root/owned Business context (BIZ-####). Open it and read its gate.

stages.title: Accept the governing ADR (decision coverage)
stages.guidance: Material work needs an ACCEPTED governing ADR, allocated through the fleet-aware id allocator (never a hand-picked number; ADR-0119).

stages.title: Open a workflow NESTED under its owner
stages.guidance: The workflow MUST live under its parent's workflows/ dir (BIZ-0001 rule 3) — never loose/central. The verifier blocks a central placement (second cut).

stages.title: Human approval of the Business
stages.guidance: An AI can never self-approve a Business — approval requires --actor human and a valid decision hash.

stages.title: Implement at the permitted phase
stages.guidance: Source writes are permitted once the workflow reaches the ship phase (or for trivial work). Earlier phases produce planning docs only.

stages.title: Tests green
stages.guidance: The suite passes on a real run — prose ('tests passed') is not a receipt.

stages.title: QA sign-off
stages.guidance: A PASS verdict from the QA gate, not a self-assertion.

stages.title: Register the session
stages.guidance: Close the loop: register the session so the journey + CHANGELOG stay truthful.

enforcement._note: First cut (ADR-0127): verifier + boot/exec surfacing are advisory-rich. Blocking checkpoints (workflowNestedUnderOwner, adrNumberContiguous, governingAdrAccepted, testsGreen+qaSignoff at completion) are turned on in the second cut, guarded+fallback per ADR-0125.
